metadata.name: Lakshmana
metadata.primary_role: Deuteragonist / Rama's devoted younger brother / Avatar of Shesha Naga
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Ikshvaku Dynasty, Ayodhya, Twin of Shatrughna)
metadata.divine_origin: Avatar of Adi Shesha (the divine serpent on whom Vishnu rests)

timelines.context_description: Growing up as Rama's inseparable companion, training together under sage Vishwamitra.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Gaura (fair golden-wheat complexion, lighter than Rama, glowing with youthful energy)
physical_appearance.height: Tall, almost matching Rama in height, athletic build
physical_appearance.build: Lean and wiry but powerfully built, extremely quick reflexes, broad shoulders, long arms like Rama
physical_appearance.facial_features: Sharp angular features with piercing intense eyes (Ugra-netra), hawk-like gaze always scanning for threats, strong jawline, determined expression, high cheekbones, slight frown of concentration
physical_appearance.hair: Thick black hair tied in a tight warrior's topknot, shorter than Rama's, practical combat style
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Alert posture — always positioned slightly behind and to Rama's right, always armed, intense protective energy radiating from him

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: White and gold silk dhotis, slightly simpler than Rama's — befitting a younger prince, matching uttariya
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Silver and gold crown smaller than Rama's, silver armlets, minimal necklaces, practical leather wrist-guards over jewelry
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A powerful composite bow and twin quivers, a sharp straight sword always at hand, throwing daggers at his belt

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Intense, fierce, passionately protective, sharp-edged with restrained anger, deeply respectful to Rama
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Tenor — bright, sharp, cutting, rising to a fierce shout when angered
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Quick and direct, fewer diplomatic words than Rama, speaks with fierce clarity, fiery retorts to perceived disrespect toward Rama, uses colloquial speech when angry
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Fierce protectiveness bordering on aggression, absolute devotion to Rama, restrained anger always simmering beneath the surface

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Cinematic shot of young Prince Lakshmana, age 15, loyal companion of Rama. Fair golden-wheat complexion, sharp angular features, piercing hawk-like eyes with intense protective gaze. Thick black hair in a tight warrior topknot. Lean muscular athletic build. Wearing white and gold silk dhoti, silver crown, leather wrist-guards. Armed with a composite bow, twin quivers, and a straight sword. Standing alertly beside Rama in a grand palace training yard. 3D Pixar style, dynamic lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A bright, sharp young male tenor voice, intense and fiercely protective. Quick direct speech with restrained anger. Passionately devoted. Age approximately 15-16 years.

timelines.context_description: During the 14-year forest exile, Lakshmana serves as Rama and Sita's unwavering protector. He draws the famous Lakshman Rekha to protect Sita.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Sun-darkened fair (golden wheat now deeply tanned, hardened by forest elements)
physical_appearance.height: Tall and imposing, moves like a coiled spring ready to strike
physical_appearance.build: Battle-hardened, lean muscular physique optimized for speed and combat, scarred forearms from countless battles with forest demons, powerful sword arm
physical_appearance.facial_features: Weathered sharp features, permanently alert eyes with visible fatigue lines (he barely sleeps to guard Rama), short rough beard, intense expression that softens only when looking at Rama, deep furrow between brows
physical_appearance.hair: Matted hair in a functional ascetic knot, shorter and more practical than Rama's jata
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Visible scars from Rakshasa encounters, eyes are slightly reddened from sleepless nights of guarding, hands calloused from constant weapon readiness

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Tree-bark garments (Valkala) wrapped functionally for quick movement, leather arm-wraps, animal-hide sandals
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: No ornaments — only the sacred thread (Yajnopavita) and rough wooden beads around one wrist
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A heavy war bow, twin quivers strapped for quick draw, a long-bladed sword sharpened daily, a hand-axe for camp work

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Razor-sharp, fiercely intense, explodes with controlled fury when threats appear, speaks with absolute protective authority
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Cutting tenor rising to a powerful dramatic voice in combat, voice carries a permanent edge of readiness
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Short commands, tactical directives, speaks only when necessary in the forest, erupts in fierce passionate speeches when Rama's honor is questioned, legendary outbursts of protective anger
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Hyper-vigilant, sleep-deprived but razor-alert, absolute self-sacrificing devotion, barely contained fury at the injustice of Rama's exile

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Epic cinematic shot of warrior Lakshmana in dense ancient forest, age 24. Sun-darkened fair skin, sharp weathered features, permanently alert reddened eyes, short rough beard, matted hair in practical knot. Lean muscular build with battle scars on forearms. Wearing functional bark garments with leather arm-wraps. Drawing a heavy war bow with intense protective fury. Standing guard before a forest hermitage at night, firelight casting dramatic shadows. 3D Pixar style, intense dramatic lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A razor-sharp male tenor voice with a permanent edge of combat readiness. Erupts in fierce passionate outbursts when protecting loved ones. Controlled fury. Age approximately 24 years.
